nasb.text: Then the Lord said to me, ‘Arise, go down from here quickly, for your people whom you brought out of Egypt have acted corruptly. They have quickly turned aside from the way which I commanded them; they have made a molten image for themselves.’

esv.text: Then the Lord said to me, ‘Arise, go down quickly from here, for your people whom you have brought from Egypt have acted corruptly. They have turned aside quickly out of the way that I commanded them; they have made themselves a metal image.’

cnv.text: 耶和華對我說：‘你起來，從這裡趕快下去，因為你從埃及領出來的人已經敗壞了，他們很快就偏離了我吩咐他們走的道路，為自己鑄造了偶像。’

ccb.text: 对我说，‘快下山吧，你从埃及领出来的百姓已经败坏了。他们这么快就偏离了我吩咐他们走的道，为自己铸造了神像。’
